name: sdd
description: Codex-friendly Spec-driven development workflow adapted from kamioj-sdd.

interface.shortDescription: Spec-driven development workflow for larger changes.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-friendly copy of kamioj-sdd's spec-driven workflow. It keeps research, ask, design, propose, apply, verify, and archive guidance available as skill context. Claude-specific slash commands and PowerShell hooks are retained as reference files only.
